title: Milestone source-of-truth acceptance criteria
context: Sprint 5 handoff captured milestone exit criteria that must remain canonical and auditable: (1) governance + milestone checks continue passing after sprint close and (2) sprint handoff artifact format validation enforces mandatory sections and capability mapping.
decision: Establish this directive record as the source of truth for milestone acceptance criteria and require schema-backed decision record validation as part of relevant governance PR evidence.
consequences: Milestone governance PRs must preserve both acceptance criteria and include decision record schema validation evidence so source-of-truth directives remain consistent with handoff governance checks.
